name: transaction-mcp-bandate
description: Safe multisig MCP server and Ledger signing UI

scripts.build:ui: npx esbuild ledger-ui/buffer-polyfill-src.mjs --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --outfile=ledger-ui/buffer-polyfill.js && npx esbuild ledger-ui/ledger-bundle-entry.mjs --bundle --format=esm --outfile=ledger-ui/ledger-bundle.js --platform=browser --define:global=globalThis --define:'process.env.NODE_DEBUG=""'
